---
title: "Notification letter"
format: docx
params: 
  email: NULL
  first_name: NULL
---

Send the message below to `r email`

***

Dear `r first_name`,

Thank you for your entry in the University Libraries Data Visualization 
Challenge. After a lengthy and difficult review by a panel of five judges, your 
entry was not selected as one of the finalists. Although your entry was not one 
of the winners for this year’s competition, the judges appreciate your efforts.

Given your work in data visualization, we encourage you to apply next year and 
look forward to seeing you at campus data events, such as the Tuesday morning 
Data & Viz events 
([https://libcal.library.arizona.edu/event/15844620](https://libcal.library.arizona.edu/event/15844620)) 
and the annual Research Bazaar on May 14-15
([https://libcal.library.arizona.edu/event/16520953](https://libcal.library.arizona.edu/event/16520953)). 

Sincerely,

Jeffrey C. Oliver
On behalf of the Data Cooperative
University Libraries
University of Arizona
